zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Weston於大約1501年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特布陽斯頓時，她的父親Sir Richard Weston MP38歲，母親Anne Sandys38歲。她於1526年與Sir John Fitz Rogers在英國英格蘭多瑟特布陽斯頓結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1581年在英國英格蘭享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特布藍德福德 福盧姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Weston于大约1501年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特布陽斯頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard Weston MP38岁，母亲Anne Sandys38岁。她于1526年与Sir John Fitz Rogers在英国英格兰多瑟特布陽斯頓结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1581年在英国英格兰享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特布藍德福德 福盧姆。

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Weston was born about 1501, in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Weston MP, was 38 and her mother, Anne Sandys, was 38. She married Sir John Fitz Rogers in 1526, in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1581, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Blandford Forum, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Weston est née environ 1501, à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Weston MP, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Anne Sandys, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Fitz Rogers en 1526, à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1581, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Blandford Forum, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Weston um 1501 in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Weston MP 38 und ihre Mutter Anne Sandys 38. Sie hat 1526 in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Sir John Fitz Rogers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1581 im Alter von 81 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Blandford Forum, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Weston è nata il circa 1501 nel Bryanston, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Richard Weston MP, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Anne Sandys, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Fitz Rogers nel 1526, nel Bryanston, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1581, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Blandford Forum, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Westonが約1501年にイギリスイギリスドールセトブリアンストンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Weston MPは38歳，母Anne Sandysは38歳であった。1526年にイギリスイギリスドールセトブリアンストンでSir John Fitz Rogersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1581年にイギリスイギリスで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトブランドフォード フォーウムにて埋葬された。

ko.Blanford, England: 미국 인디애나 주 베밀리언 클린턴 타운시프 블랜퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Weston(이)가 대략 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브라이아스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Weston MP(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Sandys(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1526년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브라이아스턴에서 Sir John Fitz Rogers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1581년 영국 잉글랜드에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 블랜드퍼드 포럼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Weston nasceu aproximadamente 1501, em Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Weston MP, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Anne Sandys, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Fitz Rogers em 1526, em Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1581, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Blandford Forum, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Blanford, England: бланфорд, клинтон тоуншип, вирмиллион, Индиана, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Weston родилась около 1501 г. в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Weston MP было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Sandys, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Fitz Rogers в 1526 г. в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1581 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности бландфорд форум, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Weston nació aproximadamente 1501, en Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Weston MP, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Anne Sandys, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir John Fitz Rogers en 1526, en Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1581, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Blandford Forum, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
